title: Duck Tape All Purpose Masking Tape 50mm x 50m, indoor painting and decorating for multi surfaces prevent paint bleed
features: Suitable for most paint such as emulsion and gloss, together with most spray paints
Ideal for labelling as well as painting
An everday, masking tape, endorsed by the Duck
As with all quality masking tapes, please test on a small area before and remove soon after painting
description: From the manufacturer Duck All Purpose Masking Tape Achieve professional-grade results with Duck All Purpose Masking Tape, the versatile adhesive essential for any project requiring precision and care. Whether you're masking off skirting boards for a fresh coat of paint or securing watercolour paper, Duck Tape provides the reliability you need with the ease of use you desire. Our tape comes in a variety of sizes, including a standard painter's 25mm, a wider 50mm for larger surfaces, and an extra wide option for those substantial projects. With Duck Tape, you can expect a perfect tear, a firm hold, and a clean removal every time. The thicker options offer increased durability for heavier tasks. Designed to resist curling and slivering, our tape unrolls smoothly and adheres securely for a professional look. Whether you’re a seasoned professional or a weekend DIYer, Duck All Purpose Masking Tape ensures that your projects turn out precisely as planned. Duck All Purpose Masking Tape is your go-to for painting perfection, crafting precision, and decorating excellence. With Duck Tape, you can transform any space or project from ordinary to extraordinary. Features Sharp Paint Lines: Precision with every use. Variety of Widths: 25mm to extra wide 50mm. Clean Removal: No residue, no damage. Strong Adhesion: Holds securely in place. Multi-Surface: Sticks to paint, wood, paper. Easy Tear: Unrolls smoothly, tears cleanly. Painting and Decorating Tips: Prepare Ensure the surfaces to be painted are free from dust, oil, grease, polish and moisture. Use a sponge and bucket of soapy water to clean areas to be painted. Fill any cracks or small holes using an appropriate filler. Sand over walls and skirting boards to create a smooth surface to ensure paint will adhere effectively and evenly. Mask To help create a professional looking paint job, use Duck masking tape to cover and protect any areas not to be painted. Apply the Duck masking tape in small sections and do not stretch the tape. Protect your flooring using Duck masking tape and dust sheets. Paint Paint your desired wall or surface, following the manufacturer’s recommendations. A quality brush makes it easier to apply paint evenly. The right roller is dependent on the type of paint being applied, so look for a roller that is specified for type of paint you are using (i.e., gloss, emulsion, etc.) Remove Tape Immediately Once you have painted, remove masking tape immediately at a 90-degree angle. Do not wait for the paint to fully cure. Duck All Purpose Masking Tape An all purpose masking tape for general interior applications and crafting. Ideal for multi-surfaces and help prevent paint bleed.
